name: d2d_timeout_retry
description: A D2D RX direction that fails to land within the host-defined timeout window must trigger exactly one retry of the same frame, and the audit log ring buffer must record the timeout-and-retry as an ordered pair (TIMEOUT followed by RETRY_OK or RETRY_FAIL).
protocol_note: The γ-side RTL stub (`src/d2d_holo_mesh.v`) is a registered TX / latched RX path; timeout/retry is a host-side responsibility on top of the stub. This vector pins what the host expects to observe on the audit surface.

multi_tile_receipt.rationale: Exactly one logical frame was accepted after retry.

failure_mode_under_test.name: double_advance
failure_mode_under_test.description: If both the timed-out attempt and the retry advance the frame counter, ordering is broken.

anti_claim: If the audit log shows a gap, a duplicate, or a TIMEOUT that is never followed by RETRY_OK / RETRY_FAIL on the same direction, the implementation violates TN-D2D-07.
